title: Garlicky and Snappy Mediterranean Lamb Kidney Dumplings
description: A comforting Mediterranean dish featuring lamb kidney and savory dumplings, perfect for a cozy evening meal.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the lamb kidney, onion, garlic, parsley, oregano, salt, and black pepper, and mix well until just combined.
Add the flour to the bowl and mix until the lamb mixture is evenly coated.
Gradually add the egg and water to the bowl, mixing until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Cut the dough into 12 equal pieces, and roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk, and place a tablespoon of the lamb mixture in the center of each disk.
Fold the dough over the filling, and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
When the oil is hot, add the dumplings to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Transfer the dumplings to a baking dish, and spoon the yogurt and lemon juice mixture over the top of each dumpling.
Bake the dumplings in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through and golden brown.
Serve the dumplings hot, garnished with additional parsley and lemon wedges if desired.
To make the yogurt and lemon juice mixture, combine the yogurt and lemon juice in a small bowl and mix well until smooth.
